name: Economy of the Soreheim Alliance
pillars: communal ownership enforced through quota law and restorative justice
resource extraction, land clearing, and tower expansion in the Eternal Lands
agriculture, labor routing, and craft throughput in the Eternal Lands
high-order manufacturing, war production, foreign trade oversight, and refinement in Soreheim Proper
domestic patronage and favor networks routed through industrial clans and settlement families
tensions: tower expansion strain between central demand and regional survival
